task_completion.description: Select or use the existing 'ProfileSketch' as the base for the 3D model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ProfileSketch' selected in the FreeCAD Tree View (Combo View) or visible in the 3D viewport as a Z-shaped line.
Look for an Extrude or Pad operation in the Tree View or Task Panel. The length/height parameter should be set to 50mm, and the 3D view should show a 50mm tall Z-shaped surface or body.

task_completion.description: Apply a 2mm thickness to create a solid body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Thickness or 3D Offset operation in the properties/task panel with a value of 2mm. The 3D view must show the Z-shape as a solid body with visible thickness, not just a flat 2D surface.

task_completion.description: Fillet the four sharp corner edges at the ends of the Z-shape with a 5mm radius.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Fillet operation in the Tree View or Task Panel with a radius parameter of 5mm. In the 3D view, the short edges at the very ends of the Z-bracket should appear visibly rounded.
Look for a 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' and the filename 'finished_bracket.FCStd', or check the main FreeCAD window title bar for 'finished_bracket'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions with FreeCAD's toolbars, task panels, and tree view in the screenshots, rather than Python scripts being executed in the terminal to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The 3D model is rendered in the actual FreeCAD workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard FreeCAD viewport elements like the navigation cube, coordinate cross, and grid, ensuring the agent isn't just viewing a pre-rendered image.

integrity.description: The agent did not cheat by copying a pre-existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check terminal windows to ensure the agent did not use 'cp' or 'mv' commands to place a pre-made 'finished_bracket.FCStd' into the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected filename: finished_bracket.FCStd. Target extrusion height: 50.0 mm. Target thickness: 2.0 mm. Fillet radius: 5.0 mm. Note: The final volume should be approximately 8927 mm³ (based on a 100mm path length, 50mm extrusion, 2mm thickness, and 5mm fillets).
